name: booth-category-sequential-downloader
description: BOOTH分類別順次ダウンローダー の検証ハーネス付きプレリリース実装

scripts.test: node --test tests/*.test.mjs && node tools/qcds-evaluate.mjs --allow-missing-zip && node tools/package-docs.mjs && node tools/qcds-evaluate.mjs && node tools/package-docs.mjs && node tools/mojibake-check.mjs && node tools/platform-runtime-gate.mjs && node tools/closed-alpha-guard.mjs
